title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring · Program Brief: Oop Open Closed
summary: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop open closed increment in a refactored maintainable service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create extension points around observed stable variation without prebuilding speculative plugin systems.
Assign responsibilities by cohesive reason to change rather than forcing one method or one field per class.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
